purpose: Provenance for the two independent judge runs feeding Q-IRR / C6-grounding / Q-DISC specificity in the v3 revision loop.
independence_evidence: Runs were launched separately with no shared state; every rationale differs in phrasing and quoted evidence. Verified 27/27 identical verdicts, 0 disagreements (irr_result.json).
note: Model *identities* are recorded here rather than in the JSONL rows, which are kept as pure verdict data (no prose). Base-rate caveat: 26/27 GOOD, so kappa=1.0 is base-rate-limited; the load-bearing claim is 100% observed agreement.
